activities.instructions: Choose the option that completes the third conditional correctly.
activities.prompt: If we ___ the earlier flight, we would have arrived before the storm.
activities.explanation: La condición pasada irreal usa past perfect: «had taken».

activities.instructions: Choose the option that completes the third conditional correctly.
activities.prompt: She would have noticed the typo if she ___ the final page.
activities.explanation: La lectura no realizada se expresa con «had read».

activities.instructions: Choose the option that completes the third conditional correctly.
activities.prompt: If the road hadn't been closed, the delivery ___ on time.
activities.explanation: El resultado pasado alternativo usa «would have arrived».

activities.instructions: Choose the option that completes the third conditional correctly.
activities.prompt: We might have stayed longer if the hotel ___ a room available.
activities.explanation: El past perfect de «have» es «had had».

activities.instructions: Choose the option that completes the third conditional correctly.
activities.prompt: If you had told me about the fault, I ___ you fix it.
activities.explanation: La ayuda posible pero no realizada se expresa con «could have helped».

activities.instructions: Choose the option that completes the third conditional correctly.
activities.prompt: If I ___ the warning, I wouldn't have opened the attachment.
activities.explanation: La condición lleva «had seen»; «would» pertenece al resultado.

activities.instructions: Choose the option that completes the third conditional correctly.
activities.prompt: They wouldn't have lost the contract if they ___ the deadline.
activities.explanation: Cumplir el plazo era la condición pasada no realizada: «had met».

activities.instructions: Choose the option that completes the third conditional correctly.
activities.prompt: If the alarm had worked, someone ___ the smoke sooner.
activities.explanation: La detección no es segura, por lo que «might have noticed» es preciso.

activities.instructions: Choose the option that completes the third conditional correctly.
activities.prompt: The plant would have survived if it ___ regularly.
activities.explanation: La condición requiere past perfect pasivo: «had been watered».

activities.instructions: Choose the option that completes the third conditional correctly.
activities.prompt: If the instructions had been clearer, fewer users ___ mistakes.
activities.explanation: Los errores pertenecen al pasado alternativo: «would have made».

activities.instructions: Choose the option that completes the third conditional correctly.
activities.prompt: ___ we known about the strike, we would have travelled a day earlier.
activities.explanation: La inversión formal comienza con «Had we known».

activities.instructions: Choose the option that completes the third conditional correctly.
activities.prompt: Had the lock been replaced, the break-in ___ prevented.
activities.explanation: El resultado pasivo y posible es «might have been prevented».

activities.instructions: Choose the option that completes the third conditional correctly.
activities.prompt: If the data ___ independently, the inconsistency might have emerged.
activities.explanation: Los datos reciben la acción; usamos «had been verified».

activities.instructions: Choose the option that completes the third conditional correctly.
activities.prompt: The negotiation could have succeeded if both parties ___ less defensive.
activities.explanation: La actitud pertenece a aquella negociación pasada: «had been».

activities.instructions: Choose the option that completes the third conditional correctly.
activities.prompt: If the sensor hadn't failed, the valve ___ automatically.
activities.explanation: El cierre alternativo pertenece al pasado: «would have closed».

activities.instructions: Choose the option that completes the third conditional correctly.
activities.prompt: We might not have discovered the leak if the neighbour ___ us.
activities.explanation: La alerta pasada que sí ocurrió se niega hipotéticamente con «hadn't alerted».

activities.instructions: Choose the option that completes the third conditional correctly.
activities.prompt: Had the sample been sealed properly, it ___ contaminated.
activities.explanation: La contaminación pasada alternativa usa «wouldn't have become».

activities.instructions: Choose the option that completes the third conditional correctly.
activities.prompt: If the estimate had included taxes, the final cost ___ such a surprise.
activities.explanation: La sorpresa ocurrió en el pasado; la alternativa es «wouldn't have been».

activities.instructions: Choose the option that completes the third conditional correctly.
activities.prompt: Had the board ___ the risk, it might have delayed the launch.
activities.explanation: La inversión conserva el participio «understood»: «Had the board understood».

activities.instructions: Choose the option that completes the third conditional correctly.
activities.prompt: If the archive hadn't been indexed, locating the record ___ weeks.
activities.explanation: La duración posible en el pasado se expresa con «could have taken».

activities.instructions: Choose the option that completes the third conditional correctly.
activities.prompt: The error would have propagated if the validation step ___ it.
activities.explanation: La validación sí lo detectó; la condición irreal usa «hadn't caught».

activities.instructions: Choose the option that completes the third conditional correctly.
activities.prompt: If all participants had been treated equally, the outcome ___ different.
activities.explanation: El resultado alternativo incierto usa «might have been».

activities.instructions: Choose the option that completes the third conditional correctly.
activities.prompt: Had the witness arrived on time, the hearing ___ postponed.
activities.explanation: El aplazamiento pasado pasivo se niega con «wouldn't have been postponed».

activities.instructions: Choose the option that completes the third conditional correctly.
activities.prompt: If the initial forecast ___ realistic, we wouldn't have requested emergency funding.
activities.explanation: La previsión inicial pertenece al pasado y usa «had been».

activities.instructions: Choose the option that completes the third conditional correctly.
activities.prompt: Had we documented the workaround, the next team ___ the same problem.
activities.explanation: La repetición ocurrió en el pasado; la alternativa es «wouldn't have repeated».
